zh.lifeSummary: 當John St Leger於大約1400年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親Arnold St Leger27歲，母親Joane de Luxembourg19歲。他於1428年與Margery Donnet在英國肯特武爾可姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1430年被列為sheriff of kent。他去世於1441年享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John St Leger于大约1400年出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲Arnold St Leger27岁，母亲Joane de Luxembourg19岁。他于1428年与Margery Donnet在英国肯特武爾可姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1430年被列为sheriff of kent。他去世于1441年享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  French: habitational name from any of the places so called, for example in Normandy, named from a religious dedication to a (male) St. Clair.
2  North American variant spelling of   St  .   Claire  .

variants.name: Claire
meanings: Irish: variant of   Clare  .
Variant of   Clair  , an altered form of German   Klare  .
French: variant of   Clair  .

nameMeanings.name: Leger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Lucien, Pierre, Yvon, Antoine, Aurele, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Zoel, Adelard.

French (Léger) and English: from the ancient Germanic personal name Leudgari, composed of the elements leud ‘people’ and gari (from garwa) ‘ready, eager’ or gari ‘spear’ and Latinized as Leodegar(ius). The name was borne by a 7th-century Christian saint, bishop of Autun, whose fame contributed to the popularity of the name in France. See also Ledger and St. Leger .
French (Léger): nickname from léger ‘light, superficial’.

variants.name: Lege
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphie, Emile, Gaston, Henri, Leonce, Minus, Numa, Pierre, Rodolph.
German: topographic name meaning ‘swamp’.
Altered form of French Léger (see Leger ).

variants.name: Legere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Armand, Normand, Aurele, Jacques, Adelard, Alban, Antoine, Desire, Eloi, Monique, Yvon.
French (Légère): nickname from légère, a feminine form of Léger ‘light, superficial’ (see Leger 2).
Altered form of French   Leger   1 or 2.

variants.name: Lougee
meanings: Channel Islands: altered form of Laugee, a variant of French Lauger, itself either a variant of Léger (see Leger ) or a variant, with fused definite article l', of Auger .

History: The first recorded American bearer of this surname was John Lougee from the isle of Jersey. Born Jean Laugee and by trade a knitter, he was aged c. 18 or 19 when he emigrated to the USA in the late 1600s, settling in Exeter, NH, where he became known as John Lougee, marrying Anne, the daughter of Colonel Moses Gilman.

variants.name: Ledger
meanings: English: from a Norman personal name, Leodegar, Old French Legier, of ancient Germanic origin (see Leger 1).
English: metonymic occupational name from Middle English legger ‘one who lays stone, a mason’, a derivative of Old English lecgan ‘to lay’.
Americanized form of French   Leger   1.

variants.name: St. Leger
meanings: French (Saint-Léger): habitational name from any of several places in various parts of France named Saint-Léger (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Leodegar, in French St. Léger, the martyred 7th-century bishop of Autun), or a nickname with the prefix Saint as an (ironic) attachment to the personal name or surname Léger (see Leger 1).

Haitian (also Saint-Léger): from Saint-Léger, a nickname, ornamental name, or personal name composed of the French prefix Saint and the personal name Léger (see Leger 1), or perhaps a habitational name from a place in Haiti called Saint-Léger (compare 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Saint-Léger in La Manche or Saint-Léger-aux-Bois in Seine-Maritime, France (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John St Leger was born about 1400, in Kent, England, his father, Arnold St Leger, was 27 and his mother, Joane de Luxembourg, was 19. He married Margery Donnet in 1428, in Ulcombe, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. In 1430, at the age of 31, his occupation is listed as sheriff of kent. He died in 1441, at the age of 42.

fr.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John St Leger est né environ 1400, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Arnold St Leger, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joane de Luxembourg, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margery Donnet en 1428, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. En 1430, à l’âge de 31 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of kent. Il est décédé en 1441, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John St Leger um 1400 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnold St Leger 27 und seine Mutter Joane de Luxembourg 19. Er hat 1428 in Ulcombe, Kent, England Margery Donnet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1430, als er 31 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of kent aufgeführt. Er starb 1441 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John St Leger è nato il circa 1400 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, Arnold St Leger, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joane de Luxembourg, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margery Donnet nel 1428, nel Ulcombe, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1430, all'età di 31 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of kent. Morì nel 1441, all'età di 42 anni.

ko.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: 영국 켄트 울코브 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John St Leger(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnold St Leger(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane de Luxembourg(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1428년 영국 켄트 울코브에서 Margery Donnet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1430년, 31세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of kent이었다. 그는 1441년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John St Leger nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Arnold St Leger, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Luxembourg, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Donnet em 1428, em Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1430, com 31 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of kent. Ele faleceu em 1441, com 42 anos.

ru.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: алл сеинц' чурч, улкомб, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John St Leger родился около 1400 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Arnold St Leger было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Luxembourg, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Donnet в 1428 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1430 году, в возрасте 31 год,  он работал по профессии sheriff of kent. Он умер в 1441 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John St Leger nació aproximadamente 1400, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Arnold St Leger, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joane de Luxembourg, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margery Donnet en 1428, en Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1430, a la edad de 31 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of kent. Murió en 1441, a la edad de 42 años.
